TTIPTAP

80%

Onboarding

Staff / provider setup

Join a business using an invite/join code, or connect later. Your workspace will adapt once linked.

Backend invite-code join is not implemented yet. This step is designed and will be activated when the API exists.

Back

Steps

  1. Account
  2. Worker type
  3. Profile
  4. Join a business
  5. Review

TIPTAP principle

Configure the workspace before you enter it.

Category-native objects and role-aware routes keep daily operations calm and predictable.
